item.title: Download Q-Dir 12.61
item.description: Q-Dir is software to manage the entire file and folder on the computer, allowing to see file in same time 4 different positions (viewport quadro) while still maintaining all the standard features of the Explorer. item.title: Download HDD Raw Copy Tool 2.6
item.description: HDD Raw Copy Tool is software that creates exact copies of SATA, IDE, SAS, SCSI or SSD hard drives. It can create sector-by-sector copies of all sectors of the hard drive (MBR, boot record, all partitions as well as the space in between). Additionally, HDD Raw Copy Tool can create accurate raw (dd) or compressed images of the entire media (including service data such as MBR, Boot Record, etc.). Features of HDD Raw Copy Tool Data recovery: make a copy of the damaged drive to attempt...

item.title: Download SayPaste 2.20260328.0
item.description: SayPaste AI is designed for those who value privacy, speed, and control. Whether you're a writer, researcher, or simply tired of typing, it converts your voice into high-quality text, controlled by simple keyboard shortcuts, and sends it directly to your clipboard. SayPaste AI works silently in the background and only listens when you ask. Simply press one shortcut key to start recording and another shortcut key to stop and transcribe. item.title: Download Ventoy 1.1.12 + LiveCD
item.description: Ventoy is an open source tool for creating bootable USB drives for ISO files. With ventoy, you don't need to format the disk multiple times, you just need to copy the iso file to the USB drive and boot it. You can copy multiple iso files at once and ventoy will give you a boot menu to select them. Features of Ventoy 100% Open Source Simple to Use Fast (limited only by iso file copy speed) Boot directly from iso file, no extraction required Legacy + UEFI supported in the same...
